text:
The Spell Card Shop NPC is a non-player character (NPC) shopkeeper at the Spell Card Shop in Masadora, Greed Island. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 14, Chapter 147 

Appearance

The Spell Card Shop NPC has large eyes and long hair that reaches her shoulders. She wears a hat with multiple dark spots of varying sizes, two large eyes, a nose, and a mouth, resembling the general expression of a frog. She also wears a dress with a cross-shaped design around her neck and multiple pieces of jewelry on her fingers and wrists. In the 2011 anime adaptation, she has blonde hair and blue eyes; her dress and hat are light blue, with the latter having dark blue eyes and white spots. 

Personality

Unlike her Trade Shop NPC counterparts, the Spell Card Shop NPC discloses information delightfully and bubbly. She also emphasizes how spell cards work, telling players to put the cards in their books before they leave and warning them about buying too many. 

Plot

Greed Island arc

Although Biscuit is confident that every member of Nickes' alliance was killed by the Bombers, she tells Gon that they are likely to encounter them later, adding that they may need to go by the alliance's hideout to look for clues. She then suggests they start collecting spell cards, asking Gon if he wants to sell the monster cards they have collected, and head to the Spell Card Shop. Gon energetically agrees, and the two continue walking toward Masadora. 

After the two arrive at the shop, the NPC tells them how lucky they are, as they have just received a new shipment of cards after being sold out for a while. Gon and Biscuit immediately realize that the cards are the ones that were being hoarded by Nickes' alliance. The NPC then politely asks them to open their packs inside the store and tells them to put the cards in their books before leaving. She warns them that any cards that don't fit will disappear once they leave, so they shouldn't buy too many. Biscuit says they can't fill their slots, but Gon replies that it's better to buy more, with each buying 60 spell cards.
